failedAssertions.reason: Token header still does not render 24h percentage change; rendered price style also resolved to GeistSans instead of monospace.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No candle data returned from /candles for tested intervals, so line/gradient chart rendering cannot be validated.
Hover tooltip/crosshair cannot be validated without rendered chart points because /candles responses were empty.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that seed-orderbook requires APTOS_PRIVATE_KEY and that missing key blocks local candle/trade seeding for chart-data assertions.
Recorded observed candle interval behavior: 1m/5m/15m/1h/1d returned 200 with empty arrays while 4h returned 400 in this environment.
